title: Wireless Mobility
subtitle: Seamless Roaming and Continuous Connectivity Across Wireless Networks

items.title: Layer 2 Roaming
items.desc: Clients move between access points within the same VLAN without changing IP addresses.
details: Client keeps the same IP address while roaming.
Occurs within the same VLAN and subnet.
Provides fast transition between access points.

items.title: Layer 3 Roaming
items.desc: Maintains client connectivity when moving across different VLANs and subnets.

items.title: Mobility Groups
items.desc: Controllers exchange client information to support seamless roaming across the wireless network.

items.title: Fast Secure Roaming
items.desc: 802.11r and related technologies reduce authentication delays during roaming.
details: Enhances user experience for real-time applications.

items.title: Guest Mobility
items.desc: Allows guest users to move across wireless coverage areas while maintaining sessions.
